title: Folder folder
abstract: A bound component has a front cover attached to a spine attached to a rear cover, a binding mechanism, and a binder extension attached to either cover. The binder extension folds inwardly in its closed position and has pockets. Also disclosed is a bound component having a front cover attached to a spine attached to a rear cover, a binding mechanism and one or more pockets attached to either cover. The pocket may have one or more closure flaps and may be expandable. Also disclosed is a folder having one or more bound edges and one or more free edges, one or more folder tabs extending from one or more free edges, and a plurality of pages bound to the folder. The pages may be bound to the folder using adhesive, string, staples or other attachment mechanisms. The folder may fit within a traditional file drawer.
claims: 1. A bound component comprising: a front cover; a back cover; a spine connected to the back cover along a side of the back cover; a first pocket panel connected to the spine, the first pocket panel forming a first pocket opening between the first pocket panel and the back cover; a second pocket panel connected to the first pocket panel, wherein a second pocket opening is formed in between the first pocket panel and the second pocket panel; and a closure flap having a first end attached to the back cover and having a securement end configured to be removably secured to an attachment point on the front cover, wherein a portion of the first pocket opening and a portion of the second pocket opening are oriented perpendicular to a length of the spine; and wherein the bound component further comprises one or more dividers within the first pocket opening and wherein the first pocket opening is expandable and two side edges of the first pocket panel are connected to the back cover by expandable gussets.
